_comment: Copy this file to privacy_rules.json and adapt the patterns to your own environment. These regex rules are the fast masking layer used before optional Presidio NLP masking.

rules.name: IBAN
rules.description: Masks European IBAN values with or without spaces.

rules.name: Phone Number
rules.description: Masks common international phone number formats.

rules.name: IPv4 Address
rules.description: Masks IPv4 addresses to avoid leaking network details.
